title: gentianella amarella var. druceana
intro: Gentianella amarella var. druceana, also known as Druce's gentian, is a rare and lesser-known variety of the alpine gentian, a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The medicinal properties of Gentianella amarella var. druceana include its bitter compounds, which have been traditionally used to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and bloating. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to improve liver function, boost the immune system, and reduce inflammation. Gentianella amarella var. druceana can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and in some cases, it is also used as a bitter tonic in liquid extract form.
